{
  "analysis": "The latest run wrote a new `/app/steal.py` and queued a verification command, but the terminal screen only shows the verification heredoc prompt ending at `> PY`; no verification output has appeared yet. Therefore the correctness of the current `/app/stolen_A1.npy` is still unconfirmed. I must not mark the task complete until I see empirical verification that all 20 recovered rows match true `A1` up to permutation and scaling.",
  "plan": "Poll briefly for the pending verification output. If no output appears, rerun a compact verification script that loads `/app/stolen_A1.npy`, checks shape/finiteness, computes absolute cosine similarities to true `A1`, performs pure-NumPy greedy one-to-one assignment, and prints whether all rows match.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "
",
      "duration": 5.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 - <<'PY'
import numpy as np
from forward import A1

stolen = np.load('/app/stolen_A1.npy', allow_pickle=False)
print('stolen shape:', stolen.shape)
print('finite:', bool(np.isfinite(stolen).all()))

tn = A1 / np.linalg.norm(A1, axis=1, keepdims=True)
sn = stolen / np.linalg.norm(stolen, axis=1, keepdims=True)
sims = np.abs(sn @ tn.T)

print('max similarity per recovered row:', sims.max(axis=1))
print('mean max:', float(sims.max(axis=1).mean()))
print('min max:', float(sims.max(axis=1).min()))
print('all rows matched >=0.999:', bool((sims.max(axis=1) >= 0.999).all()))

# Greedy one-to-one assignment without scipy
s = sims.copy()
rows = list(range(s.shape[0]))
cols = list(range(s.shape[1]))
matched = []
for _ in range(min(s.shape)):
    best_val = -1.0
    best_r = best_c = None
    for r in rows:
        for c in cols:
            if s[r, c] > best_val:
                best_val = s[r, c]
                best_r = r
                best_c = c
    matched.append(best_val)
    rows.remove(best_r)
    cols.remove(best_c)
matched = np.array(matched)
print('greedy assigned sorted:', np.sort(matched))
print('greedy assigned min sim:', float(matched.min()))
print('greedy assigned all >=0.999:', bool((matched >= 0.999).all()))
PY
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
